text: As I hear those words—"thank you"—I feel a subtle sense of completion. The room, now nearly empty, is strangely calm. The world outside this glass feels distant compared to the vibrant, idea-saturated wall nearby. I dwell for a moment in the beauty of transition: one chapter closes, the next invitation quietly stirring in the air. I feel both fulfillment and curiosity lingering, ready to step onward.
